headline: Woman Has 47 Unread Podcast Episodes, Still Starts New Ones
summary: Her podcast app has become a 'digital graveyard of abandoned interests.'
fullBody: Megan Podcasthopper has 47 episodes marked 'unplayed' across 12 different podcasts. 'I'll get to them eventually,' she lies to herself while starting a new true crime series. Her listening history includes episodes 1-3 of shows she 'got bored of' and episode 17 of a series she 'skipped around.' The podcast app has reportedly sent her a concerned notification asking 'are you okay?' She ignored it. Too busy with a new podcast.
